channel.title: My Quiet Corner — Notes
channel.description: Short notes from My Quiet Corner.

item.title: Note from 2026-07-02
item.description: You can cross-post a note to Mastodon or Bluesky from the admin, and replies over there show up as comments here. The web is nicer when it's connected.

item.title: Note from 2026-07-01
item.description: Notes are short, title-less thoughts — a microblog that lives on your own domain. Perfect for the things you'd otherwise toss into a social feed.
